# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
  agent any

  options {
    timestamps()
    disableConcurrentBuilds()
    buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '50', artifactNumToKeepStr: '10'))
    timeout(time: 90, unit: 'MINUTES')
    ansiColor('xterm')
    preserveStashes(buildCount: 10)
  }

  parameters {
    choice(name: 'ARTIFACT_TYPE', choices: ['single', 'archive'], description: 'single = deploy one file; archive = download and extract (zip/tar/tgz/tar.gz)')
    string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS', defaultValue: '', description: 'One URL per line. Supports http(s)://, s3://bucket/key, artifactory://repo/path (requires Artifactory base URL + creds).')
    string(name: 'ARTIFACT_NAME', defaultValue: '', description: 'Optional. Name/pattern for deploy artifact inside workspace (e.g., app.jar). If empty, will infer for single type.')
    string(name: 'ARTIFACT_SHA256', defaultValue: '', description: 'Optional. One SHA256 per line matching ARTIFACT_URLS order, or single SHA256 for all if only one URL.')
    booleanParam(name: 'VERIFY_TLS', defaultValue: true, description: 'Verify TLS certs for HTTPS downloads.')
    booleanParam(name: 'FAIL_ON_MISSING_CHECKSUM', defaultValue: false, description: 'Fail if checksum not provided.')
    booleanParam(name: 'DRY_RUN', defaultValue: false, description: 'If true, do not copy/restart on servers.')
    string(name: 'DEPLOY_PATH', defaultValue: '/opt/app', description: 'Destination path on production servers.')
    string(name: 'DEPLOY_OWNER', defaultValue: 'app', description: 'Owner for deployed files.')
    string(name: 'DEPLOY_GROUP', defaultValue: 'app', description: 'Group for deployed files.')
    string(name: 'DEPLOY_MODE', defaultValue: '0644', description: 'File mode for deployed files (octal).')
    string(name: 'SERVICE_NAME', defaultValue: 'app', description: 'Service to restart (systemd). Leave empty to skip restart.')
    booleanParam(name: 'RESTART_SERVICE', defaultValue: true, description: 'Restart service after deploy.')
    booleanParam(name: 'HEALTHCHECK', defaultValue: true, description: 'Run healthcheck after restart.')
    string(name: 'HEALTHCHECK_URL', defaultValue: 'http://localhost:8080/health', description: 'Healthcheck URL (executed on server via curl).')
    string(name: 'HEALTHCHECK_TIMEOUT_SECONDS', defaultValue: '60', description: 'Healthcheck timeout seconds.')
    string(name: 'TARGETS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Production targets. One per line. Formats: host OR user@host OR user@host:port')
    choice(name: 'DEPLOY_STRATEGY', choices: ['all-at-once', 'rolling'], description: 'rolling deploys one target at a time.')
    string(name: 'ROLLING_BATCH_SIZE', defaultValue: '1', description: 'For rolling: number of hosts per batch.')
    choice(name: 'SSH_KEY_CREDENTIALS_ID', choices: [''], description: 'SSH private key credential ID for connecting to targets (configure in Jenkins).')
    string(name: 'SSH_OPTS', defaultValue: '-o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ServerAliveInterval=30 -o ServerAliveCountMax=10', description: 'Extra SSH options.')
    choice(name: 'DOWNLOAD_AUTH_MODE', choices: ['none', 'basic', 'bearer', 'aws', 'artifactory'], description: 'Auth method for downloads.')
    string(name: 'DOWNLOAD_USERNAME', defaultValue: '', description: 'For basic auth.')
    password(name: 'DOWNLOAD_PASSWORD_OR_TOKEN', defaultValue: '', description: 'For basic password or bearer token.')
    choice(name: 'AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID', choices: [''], description: 'AWS credentials for S3 downloads (configure in Jenkins).')
    string(name: 'AWS_REGION', defaultValue: 'us-east-1', description: 'AWS region for S3.')
    string(name: 'ARTIFACTORY_BASE_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'Required if using artifactory:// URLs, e.g., https://artifactory.company.com/artifactory')
    choice(name: 'ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID', choices: [''], description: 'Credentials (user/pass or token via password field) for Artifactory.')
    booleanParam(name: 'CLEAN_WORKSPACE', defaultValue: true, description: 'Clean workspace before download.')
  }

  environment {
    WORK_DL_DIR = 'download'
    WORK_PKG_DIR = 'package'
    WORK_META_DIR = 'meta'
  }

  stages {
    stage('Init') {
      steps {
        script {
          if (params.CLEAN_WORKSPACE) {
            deleteDir()
          }
          sh """
            set -euo pipefail
            mkdir -p '${env.WORK_DL_DIR}' '${env.WORK_PKG_DIR}' '${env.WORK_META_DIR}'
          """

          def urls = (params.ARTIFACT_URLS ?: '')
            .split('\\r?\\n')
            .collect { it.trim() }
            .findAll { it }

          if (!urls) {
            error("ARTIFACT_URLS must contain at least one URL.")
          }

          def targets = (params.TARGETS ?: '')
            .split('\\r?\\n')
            .collect { it.trim() }
            .findAll { it }

          if (!targets) {
            error("TARGETS must contain at least one target host.")
          }

          def shaLines = (params.ARTIFACT_SHA256 ?: '')
            .split('\\r?\\n')
            .collect { it.trim() }
            .findAll { it }

          if (params.FAIL_ON_MISSING_CHECKSUM && shaLines.isEmpty()) {
            error("FAIL_ON_MISSING_CHECKSUM is true but ARTIFACT_SHA256 is empty.")
          }

          currentBuild.description = "Deploy ${urls.size()} artifact(s) to ${targets.size()} target(s)"

          writeFile file: "${env.WORK_META_DIR}/urls.txt", text: urls.join('\n') + "\n"
          writeFile file: "${env.WORK_META_DIR}/targets.txt", text: targets.join('\n') + "\n"
          writeFile file: "${env.WORK_META_DIR}/sha256.txt", text: shaLines.join('\n') + (shaLines ? "\n" : "")
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Download Artifacts') {
      steps {
        script {
          def tlsFlag = params.VERIFY_TLS ? "" : "--insecure"
          def urls = readFile("${env.WORK_META_DIR}/urls.txt").split('\\r?\\n').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
          def shaLines = []
          if (fileExists("${env.WORK_META_DIR}/sha256.txt")) {
            shaLines = readFile("${env.WORK_META_DIR}/sha256.txt").split('\\r?\\n').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
          }

          def useBasic = params.DOWNLOAD_AUTH_MODE == 'basic'
          def useBearer = params.DOWNLOAD_AUTH_MODE == 'bearer'
          def useAws = params.DOWNLOAD_AUTH_MODE == 'aws'
          def useArtifactoryMode = params.DOWNLOAD_AUTH_MODE == 'artifactory'

          def hasSingleShaForAll = (shaLines.size() == 1 && urls.size() > 1)

          def downloadOne = { int idx, String url ->
            def outName = "artifact_${String.format('%02d', idx + 1)}"
            def outPath = "${env.WORK_DL_DIR}/${outName}"

            if (url.startsWith("s3://")) {
              if (!useAws) {
                error("URL '${url}' is s3:// but DOWNLOAD_AUTH_MODE is not 'aws'.")
              }
              if (!params.AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()) {
                error("AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID must be set for S3 downloads.")
              }
              withCredentials([[$class: 'AmazonWebServicesCredentialsBinding', credentialsId: params.AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID]]) {
                sh """
                  set -euo pipefail
                  aws --version
                  AWS_REGION='${params.AWS_REGION}' aws s3 cp '${url}' '${outPath}'
                """
              }
            } else if (url.startsWith("artifactory://")) {
              if (!params.ARTIFACTORY_BASE_URL?.trim()) {
                error("ARTIFACTORY_BASE_URL must be set for artifactory:// URLs.")
              }
              if (!params.ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()) {
                error("ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID must be set for artifactory:// URLs.")
              }
              def rel = url - "artifactory://"
              rel = rel.replaceAll("^/+", "")
              def full = params.ARTIFACTORY_BASE_URL.replaceAll("/+\$", "") + "/" + rel
              withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: params.ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID, usernameVariable: 'ART_U', passwordVariable: 'ART_P')]) {
                sh """
                  set -euo pipefail
                  curl -fL ${tlsFlag} -u "\$ART_U:\$ART_P" -o '${outPath}' '${full}'
                """
              }
            } else if (url ==~ /^https?:\\/\\/.+/) {
              if (useBasic) {
                withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: params.ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID ?: '___NOOP___', usernameVariable: 'DL_U', passwordVariable: 'DL_P')]) {
                  def u = params.DOWNLOAD_USERNAME?.trim()
                  if (!u) {
                    u = env.DL_U ?: ''
                  }
                  sh """
                    set -euo pipefail
                    curl -fL ${tlsFlag} -u '${u}:${params.DOWNLOAD_PASSWORD_OR_TOKEN}' -o '${outPath}' '${url}'
                  """
                }
              } else if (useBearer) {
                sh """
                  set -euo pipefail
                  curl -fL ${tlsFlag} -H 'Authorization: Bearer ${params.DOWNLOAD_PASSWORD_OR_TOKEN}' -o '${outPath}' '${url}'
                """
              } else if (useArtifactoryMode) {
                if (!params.ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()) {
                  error("ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID must be set for DOWNLOAD_AUTH_MODE=artifactory.")
                }
                withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: params.ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID, usernameVariable: 'ART_U', passwordVariable: 'ART_P')]) {
                  sh """
                    set -euo pipefail
                    curl -fL ${tlsFlag} -u "\$ART_U:\$ART_P" -o '${outPath}' '${url}'
                  """
                }
              } else {
                sh """
                  set -euo pipefail
                  curl -fL ${tlsFlag} -o '${outPath}' '${url}'
                """
              }
            } else {
              error("Unsupported URL scheme for '${url}'. Use http(s)://, s3://, or artifactory://")
            }

            def sha = ''
            if (shaLines) {
              if (hasSingleShaForAll) sha = shaLines[0]
              else if (idx < shaLines.size()) sha = shaLines[idx]
            }

            if (sha?.trim()) {
              writeFile file: "${outPath}.sha256", text: "${sha}  ${outPath}\n"
              sh """
                set -euo pipefail
                sha256sum -c '${outPath}.sha256'
              """
            } else if (params.FAIL_ON_MISSING_CHECKSUM) {
              error("Missing SHA256 for URL index ${idx + 1}: ${url}")
            }

            def inferredName = params.ARTIFACT_NAME?.trim()
            if (!inferredName && params.ARTIFACT_TYPE == 'single') {
              def base = url.tokenize('/').last()
              if (base && base != url) inferredName = base
              else inferredName = outName
            }
            def finalName = inferredName ?: outName

            sh """
              set -euo pipefail
              mkdir -p '${env.WORK_PKG_DIR}'
              cp -f '${outPath}' '${env.WORK_PKG_DIR}/${finalName}'
            """

            return finalName
          }

          def names = []
          for (int i = 0; i < urls.size(); i++) {
            names << downloadOne(i, urls[i])
          }

          writeFile file: "${env.WORK_META_DIR}/artifact_names.txt", text: names.join('\n') + "\n"
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Prepare Package') {
      steps {
        script {
          def names = readFile("${env.WORK_META_DIR}/artifact_names.txt").split('\\r?\\n').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
          if (params.ARTIFACT_TYPE == 'archive') {
            if (names.size() != 1) {
              error("ARTIFACT_TYPE=archive requires exactly one artifact URL (got ${names.size()}).")
            }
            def name = names[0]
            def filePath = "${env.WORK_PKG_DIR}/${name}"
            sh """
              set -euo pipefail
              cd '${env.WORK_PKG_DIR}'
              ls -la
              if file '${name}' | grep -qi 'zip archive'; then
                unzip -oq '${name}' -d '${env.WORK_PKG_DIR}/extracted'
              else
                mkdir -p '${env.WORK_PKG_DIR}/extracted'
                tar -xf '${name}' -C '${env.WORK_PKG_DIR}/extracted' || true
              fi
              rm -f '${name}'
              mv '${env.WORK_PKG_DIR}/extracted'/* '${env.WORK_PKG_DIR}/' 2>/dev/null || true
              rmdir '${env.WORK_PKG_DIR}/extracted' 2>/dev/null || true
              find '${env.WORK_PKG_DIR}' -maxdepth 2 -type f -print
            """
          } else {
            sh """
              set -euo pipefail
              find '${env.WORK_PKG_DIR}' -maxdepth 1 -type f -print
            """
          }
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Deploy') {
      steps {
        script {
          def targets = readFile("${env.WORK_META_DIR}/targets.txt").split('\\r?\\n').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
          def batchSize = Math.max(1, (params.ROLLING_BATCH_SIZE ?: '1') as Integer)
          def strategy = params.DEPLOY_STRATEGY

          def parseTarget = { String t ->
            def user = ''
            def hostPort = t
            if (t.contains('@')) {
              def parts = t.split('@', 2)
              user = parts[0]
              hostPort = parts[1]
            }
            def host = hostPort
            def port = ''
            if (hostPort.contains(':')) {
              def parts = hostPort.split(':', 2)
              host = parts[0]
              port = parts[1]
            }
            return [user: user, host: host, port: port]
          }

          def deployToOne = { String t ->
            def parsed = parseTarget(t)
            def userHost = (parsed.user ? "${parsed.user}@" : "") + parsed.host
            def sshPortOpt = parsed.port ? "-p ${parsed.port}" : ""
            def scpPortOpt = parsed.port ? "-P ${parsed.port}" : ""

            def remoteTmp = "/tmp/deploy_${env.JOB_NAME.replaceAll('[^A-Za-z0-9_.-]','_')}_${env.BUILD_NUMBER}"
            def dest = params.DEPLOY_PATH

            def restartCmd = ''
            if (params.RESTART_SERVICE && params.SERVICE_NAME?.trim()) {
              restartCmd = "sudo systemctl restart '${params.SERVICE_NAME}'"
            }

            def healthCmd = ''
            if (params.HEALTHCHECK && params.HEALTHCHECK_URL?.trim()) {
              def to = (params.HEALTHCHECK_TIMEOUT_SECONDS ?: '60').toInteger()
              healthCmd = """
                end=\$((SECONDS+${to}))
                while [ \$SECONDS -lt \$end ]; do
                  if curl -fsS '${params.HEALTHCHECK_URL}' >/dev/null; then
                    exit 0
                  fi
                  sleep 2
                done
                echo "Healthcheck failed: ${params.HEALTHCHECK_URL}"
                exit 1
              """.stripIndent().trim()
            }

            if (params.DRY_RUN) {
              sh """
                set -euo pipefail
                echo "[DRY_RUN] Would deploy to ${userHost} ${parsed.port ? "(port ${parsed.port})" : ""}"
              """
              return
            }

            if (!params.SSH_KEY_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()) {
              error("SSH_KEY_CREDENTIALS_ID must be set to deploy to production servers.")
            }

            withCredentials([sshUserPrivateKey(credentialsId: params.SSH_KEY_CREDENTIALS_ID, keyFileVariable: 'SSH_KEY', usernameVariable: 'SSH_USER', passphraseVariable: 'SSH_PASSPHRASE')]) {
              def effectiveUserHost = userHost
              if (!parsed.user?.trim()) {
                effectiveUserHost = "${env.SSH_USER}@${parsed.host}"
              }

              sh """
                set -euo pipefail

                ssh -i "\$SSH_KEY" ${sshPortOpt} ${params.SSH_OPTS} '${effectiveUserHost}' "set -euo pipefail; sudo mkdir -p '${dest}' '${remoteTmp}'; sudo chown -R '${params.DEPLOY_OWNER}:${params.DEPLOY_GROUP}' '${remoteTmp}' || true"

                rsync --version >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
                if command -v rsync >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                  rsync -az --delete -e "ssh -i \\"\\\$SSH_KEY\\" ${sshPortOpt} ${params.SSH_OPTS}" '${env.WORK_PKG_DIR}/' '${effectiveUserHost}:${remoteTmp}/'
                else
                  scp -i "\$SSH_KEY" ${scpPortOpt} ${params.SSH_OPTS} -r '${env.WORK_PKG_DIR}/.' '${effectiveUserHost}:${remoteTmp}/'
                fi

                ssh -i "\$SSH_KEY" ${sshPortOpt} ${params.SSH_OPTS} '${effectiveUserHost}' "set -euo pipefail;
                  sudo mkdir -p '${dest}';
                  sudo cp -a '${remoteTmp}/.' '${dest}/';
                  sudo chown -R '${params.DEPLOY_OWNER}:${params.DEPLOY_GROUP}' '${dest}';
                  sudo find '${dest}' -type f -exec chmod '${params.DEPLOY_MODE}' {} \\;;
                  sudo rm -rf '${remoteTmp}';
                  ${restartCmd ? restartCmd + ";" : ""}
                  ${healthCmd ? healthCmd + ";" : ""}
                "
              """
            }
          }

          if (strategy == 'all-at-once') {
            def branches = [:]
            targets.each { t ->
              branches["deploy:${t}"] = { deployToOne(t) }
            }
            parallel branches
          } else {
            for (int i = 0; i < targets.size(); i += batchSize) {
              def batch = targets.subList(i, Math.min(i + batchSize, targets.size()))
              def branches = [:]
              batch.each { t ->
                branches["deploy:${t}"] = { deployToOne(t) }
              }
              parallel branches
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }

  post {
    always {
      sh """
        set +e
        echo "Workspace contents:"
        ls -la
      """
    }
    failure {
      script {
        currentBuild.description = (currentBuild.description ?: '') + " (FAILED)"
      }
    }
    success {
      script {
        currentBuild.description = (currentBuild.description ?: '') + " (OK)"
      }
    }
  }
}
